{"rule":"IF_IS","sentence":"^\\QSpecifically, the sum and product of two real numbers is as usual, and for \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, define \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q.\\E$"}
{"rule":"SENTENCE_WHITESPACE","sentence":"^\\QRn and Cn.\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_US","sentence":"^\\QRn and Cn.\\E$"}
{"rule":"IF_IS","sentence":"^\\QSpecifically, the sum and product of two real numbers is as usual, and for \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, define \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q if \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q.\\E$"}
{"rule":"UNDER_COMPOUNDS","sentence":"^\\QProve or give a counterexample: If \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q is a nonempty subset of \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q such that \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q is closed under addition and under taking additive inverses (meaning \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q whenever \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), then \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q is a subspace of \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q.\\E$"}
{"rule":"UNDER_COMPOUNDS","sentence":"^\\QLet \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q be a nonempty subset of \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q that is closed under addition and under taking additive inverses.\\E$"}
